$matchId..read: auth != null && (data.child('player1Id').val() === auth.uid || data.child('player2Id').val() === auth.uid || newData.child('player1Id').val() === auth.uid || newData.child('player2Id').val() === auth.uid)
$matchId..write: auth != null && (data.val() === null || data.child('player1Id').val() === auth.uid || data.child('player2Id').val() === auth.uid)
